## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.11.2

### 📷 Cameras and Recordings
- Preserves camera entities when an X-Sense camera-account refresh is interrupted and retries kicked ADDX sessions with fresh credentials.
- Keeps the known working native WebRTC live-view signaling path while tightening session cleanup and diagnostics.
- Improves cached HLS playback for encrypted and initialization-segment playlists, including Firefox playback.
- Keeps recording panels, services, and background sync scoped correctly when multiple X-Sense accounts are configured.

### 🛡️ Devices and Entities
- Aligns device families, entity names, status values, and supported controls with the current X-Sense Android app paths.
- Adds supported radon, mailbox, light, keypad, and device-status entities while keeping raw protocol fields in diagnostics instead of the device page.
- Cleans up obsolete integration-created entities without removing current device entities or user-managed entries.

### 🔄 Reloading
- Improves config-entry unload and reload cleanup for listeners, timers, MQTT clients, camera sessions, recording sync, panels, and services.
